code: import React,{useState}from'react';import{Box,Link,Stack,Typography}from'@mui/material';import{Link as RouterLink,useNavigate}from'react-router-dom';import{AuthLayout}from'../../../design-system/templates/AuthLayout';import{RegisterForm}from'../components/RegisterForm';import{APP_ROUTES}from'../../../shared/enums/routes';import{register as registerRequest}from'../services/authService';import{useFeedback}from'../../../core/feedback/FeedbackContext';import{normalizeApiError}from'../../../core/api/errorNormalizer';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export const RegisterPage=()=>{const navigate=useNavigate();const feedback=useFeedback();const[loading,setLoading]=useState(false);const handleSubmit=async payload=>{setLoading(true);try{await registerRequest(payload);feedback.showSuccess('Registro completado correctamente.');navigate(APP_ROUTES.LOGIN,{replace:true});}catch(error){feedback.showError(normalizeApiError(error));}finally{setLoading(false);}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(AuthLayout,{children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Stack,{spacing:3,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Box,{sx:{display:'flex',justifyContent:'center'},children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Typography,{variant:"h5",fontWeight:800,sx:{letterSpacing:1},children:"COMPANIA PRUEBA"})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(RegisterForm,{onSubmit:handleSubmit,loading:loading}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Typography,{variant:"body2",color:"text.secondary",children:["\xBFYa tiene una cuenta?",' ',/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Link,{component:RouterLink,to:APP_ROUTES.LOGIN,underline:"hover",fontWeight:700,children:"Iniciar sesi\xF3n"})]})]})});};
